section.heading: Disclosure and correction of information
section.chapeau: With respect to the information reported to the Secretary (or the agency designated under section 11134(b) of this title) under this subchapter respecting a physician or other licensed health care practitioner, the Secretary shall, by regulation, provide for—

paragraph.content: disclosure of the information, upon request, to the physician or practitioner, and
procedures in the case of disputed accuracy of the information.
